series_metadata.series_description: All legal agreements, memorandums of understanding, capital expenditure submittals, and other documents related to the expenditure of allocated funding by a grantee.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: In order to accommodate any requested audits by the U.S. Department of the Treasury, all materials are to be kept 3 (three) years from term of bond or until converted to electronic medium. ; Electronic: In order to accommodate any requested audits by the U.S. Department of the Treasury, all materials are to be kept 3 (three) years from term of bond, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
